sys_script_include.name: AppInstall-Template

sys_update_version.name: sys_script_include_011da848c3333210ccf9f1d4e40131e2
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_script_include"><sys_script_include action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><access>package_private</access><active>true</active><api_name>x_984628_deploye_0.AppInstall-Template</api_name><caller_access/><client_callable>false</client_callable><description/><mobile_callable>false</mobile_callable><name>AppInstall-Template</name><sandbox_callable>false</sandbox_callable><script><![CDATA[/**
 * @class AppInstall
 * @description Installation script
 * @since 
 * @date  
 * @version
 * @author 
 *
 */
function AppInstall() {

    const installer = new x_984628_deploye_0.Installer('Has to replaced with the');
	
	installer.start();

    installer.finish();
}]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-03-18 06:24:54</sys_created_on><sys_id>011da848c3333210ccf9f1d4e40131e2</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>AppInstall-Template</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Deployer API" source="x_984628_deploye_0">59b6b9dfc3433210ccf9f1d4e4013124</sys_package><sys_policy>read</sys_policy><sys_scope display_value="Deployer API">59b6b9dfc3433210ccf9f1d4e4013124</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_include_011da848c3333210ccf9f1d4e40131e2</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-03-18 06:24:54</sys_updated_on></sys_script_include></record_update>
